_provenance: Hand-authored fixture documenting a v1 known limitation. On trading half-days (e.g. Black Friday 2026-11-27, market closes at 13:00 ET), get_market_state uses the fixed MARKET_CLOSE_TIME=16:00 and will incorrectly return 'open' between 13:00 and 16:00. This is a documented v1 limitation; v2 will integrate a full US-equity calendar. This fixture is for documentation/future regression, not tested in the current suite.

example.note: v1 uses fixed MARKET_CLOSE_TIME=time(16,0); half-day handling is v2 scope
